data.description: Promotions kicked off weeks before Black Friday this year, driving strong sales growth across everyday items such as clothing, books, and athleisure, in addition to major discretionary purchases.

data.title: Dogecoin wants to create a "naughty list" for businesses not accepting DOGE payments, aiming to switch them to the "nice list" next year. Merry Dogemas campaign asks users to tag non-compliant companies.
data.description: On Christmas Day, Dogecoin's official account humorously introduced a "naughty list," calling out businesses that have not yet started accepting DOGE payments. In a festive gesture, Dogecoin wished everyone a "Merry Dogemas" and urged the community to identify companies on this list. The account promised to move them to the "nice list" for the next year. The X handle playfully encouraged users to tag businesses that are yet to accept DOGE payments. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Crypto sentiment remains in 'extreme fear' for 14th day as Fear & Greed Index stays low, despite Bitcoin at five times its price during FTX collapse.
data.description: The current Crypto Fear & Greed Index is reflecting lower sentiment levels compared to the time of the FTX collapse in late 2022, even though Bitcoin is now trading at approximately five times the value observed during that period.

data.title: Bitlock Wallet transitions from Telegram to mobile apps; iOS and Android versions in final testing phase for public release.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on December 25, 2025, Bitlock Wallet, a non-custodial multi-chain wallet that was initially introduced as a native Telegram mini-app, revealed that its iOS and Android apps are now in the last phase of internal testing before public release. The release for both platforms is anticipated to happen soon.

data.title: ABL Bio receives a total of 55 million in R&D funding, with 40 million as an upfront payment and 15 million as equity investment from Lilly, accelerating R&D on Grabody platform.
data.description: ABl Bio, based in Seoul, South Korea, has recently received a substantial 55 million in research and development funding. This funding includes 40 million as an initial payment and an additional 15 million in equity investment. The company plans to utilize this funding to focus on advancing research and development on core technologies, particularly expanding indications for the Grabody platform. This investment reaffirms ABL Bio's commitment to innovation and growth in the biotechnology sector.

data.title: Apirone launches new dashboard with own design system; enhancing user experience and setting foundation for future growth.
data.description: On December 25, 2025, in Tallinn, Estonia, Apirone revealed a new dashboard created using its own design system. This launch represents a major achievement for the company as it focuses on enhancing user experience and creating a strong foundation for future growth.

data.title: TIER IV chosen by NEDO for large-scale dataset for autonomous driving to boost industrial competitiveness.
data.description: In Tokyo on December 25, 2025, TIER IV, a leader in open-source software for autonomous driving, has been chosen by Japan's New Energy and Industrial Technology Development Organization (NEDO) for a project to enhance industrial competitiveness. The initiative involves a substantial investment in innovative technology by the Japanese government.

data.title: Expert Ben Cowen predicts Ethereum may not hit new highs in 2026; reclaiming all-time high could be risky "bull trap".
data.description: Crypto analyst Ben Cowen warns that if Ether reaches its all-time high in 2026 again, it could be a "bull trap." An important number in this case is the all-time high price that Ether reached previously, which would need to be surpassed. Cowen's analysis suggests that caution should be exercised if this milestone is achieved in 2026.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin praises AI chatbot Grok on X for fact-checking, boosting platform's "truth-friendliness". Elon Musk's Grok may skew towards biases. Buterin noted increased efficiency, with Grok debunking political beliefs. Other than community notes, Grok is a positive addition for X platform.
data.description: Vitalik Buterin, co-founder of Ethereum, recently commented on the impact of Grok's presence on platform X, stating that it greatly enhances the platform's credibility, second only to community notes. Buterin highlighted Grok's effectiveness in fact-checking through an AI chatbot on X, calling it a significant positive development. He noted instances where users expected Grok to validate their political opinions but were instead corrected. The ease of accessing Grok via Twitter was emphasized as a major improvement alongside community notes. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
